tasks.label: LIMAP: Quickstart (CPU)
tasks.command: set -Eeuo pipefail; test -d data/ai_001_001 || bash scripts/quickstart.sh; python runners/hypersim/triangulation.py --default_config_file cfgs/triangulation/default_cpu.yaml --input_n_views 8 --max_image_dim 400 --line2d.max_num_2d_segs 100 --line2d.extractor.method superpoint_endpoints --line2d.matcher.method nn_endpoints --output_dir outputs/quickstart_triangulation_cpu_task_v2 --skip_exists --visualize 0
